get.description: Get current status of a mission by ID.
Replay the event timeline for a mission.
AKASHA memory health — PostgreSQL/pgvector status with source badge.
Extended health — bridge status, PostgreSQL, pgvector, and timestamp.

post.description:
Search Akasha knowledge base (hybrid BM25 + vector).

Returns ranked results with metadata and optional controlled excerpts.
Falls back gracefully when Akasha backend is unavailable.

Get context for a project/mission from Akasha.

Returns synthesized context from relevant documents.
Falls back gracefully when Akasha backend is unavailable.

get.description: List available source domains and document counts from Akasha.
Qdrant operational memory health — vector DB + collection inventory.
Last N events from cross-container event bridge ring buffer.

post.description: Start the event bridge heartbeat + listener threads.

get.description:
Cross-reference all collectors to determine the operational truth.

Runs 4 checks in parallel:
  - project_alignment: git vs AW vs focus → same project?
  - infrastructure_health: docker vs OMNIS vs system → all healthy?
  - data_freshness: are all collectors returning real data?
  - git_hygiene: working trees clean? Need checkpoint?

Returns a global verdict: consistent | mostly_consistent | degraded | conflict.
Current cost summary: totals, by-model, by-mission, local-vs-cloud.
Query cost ledger entries with optional filters.
Aggregate provider/model usage, optionally filtered by period (YYYY-MM).
Full budget evaluation: all rules, overall OK/WARNING/CRITICAL/UNKNOWN.
Total cost + ROI for a mission across all periods.

post.description: Record a new cost entry in the ledger.

Receive LiteLLM spend webhook or internal OMNIS callback.

Two formats supported:
- LiteLLM: has spend/max_budget, model/tokens in metadata
- Internal: has execution_id + model directly

dry_run=True calculates cost without writing to ledger.
Set estimated business value for a mission (current period).

get.description: CRM pipeline status — vendas_crm sector health, lead state machine, gaps.

LiteLLMCallbackRequest.title: LiteLLMCallbackRequest
LiteLLMCallbackRequest.description:
Dual-format intake: LiteLLM spend webhook OR OMNIS internal format.

LiteLLM format uses: spend, max_budget, metadata.model, metadata.input_tokens, etc.
Internal format uses: execution_id, model, input_tokens, output_tokens directly.
